required_preferences.fact: Reads physical books before bed — avoids all screens, including e-readers and phones, at night during doctor-mandated screen break

supersedes.fact: Reads on her e-reader for 20 minutes before bed — never uses her phone for reading at night

required_preferences.fact: Pauses all video game play, including narrative indie games, during mandated screen-free recovery period — instead spends evenings on non-digital pastimes

supersedes.fact: Plays narrative-driven indie games in short evening bursts — never engages in multiplayer online games

required_preferences.fact: Prefers video calls with outreach and fundraising teams to hashing things out over email
Schedules regular video calls with her boyfriend in Portland, prioritizing evenings to stay connected while he's away
Brings her dog along on Tacoma visits whenever possible to provide comfort for her mother and herself during lengthy stays
Keeps a digital photo journal of her dog’s walks — never posts them publicly, just for personal memory

persona: A junior web developer at a nonprofit organization
